item.title: Rotator vs. Raw Cummins
item.description: A powerful rotator tow truck takes on a tough recovery involving a Cummins-powered vehicle, putting heavy-duty equipment and operator skill to the test

media:content.media:title: Rotator vs. Raw Cummins
media:content.media:description: A powerful rotator tow truck takes on a tough recovery involving a Cummins-powered vehicle, putting heavy-duty equipment and operator skill to the test

item.title: Excavator Trapped Between Power Lines and a Gas Line
item.description: A challenging recovery unfolds as an excavator becomes trapped between overhead power lines and a nearby gas line, requiring careful planning and precise towing operations

media:content.media:title: Excavator Trapped Between Power Lines and a Gas Line
media:content.media:description: A challenging recovery unfolds as an excavator becomes trapped between overhead power lines and a nearby gas line, requiring careful planning and precise towing operations

item.title: D6 Dozer Stuck Deep, Rescue On!
item.description: A D6 dozer is stuck deep, and the recovery operation is underway. The focus is on the equipment, setup, and field rescue process used to get the machine moving again. What would you use first?

media:content.media:title: D6 Dozer Stuck Deep, Rescue On!
media:content.media:description: A D6 dozer is stuck deep, and the recovery operation is underway. The focus is on the equipment, setup, and field rescue process used to get the machine moving again. What would you use first?

item.title: Cool Lift or Too Hot to Handle?
item.description: A heavy recovery lift in the field, showing the equipment and process used to handle a challenging vehicle recovery. What would you call this kind of operation?

media:content.media:title: Cool Lift or Too Hot to Handle?
media:content.media:description: A heavy recovery lift in the field, showing the equipment and process used to handle a challenging vehicle recovery. What would you call this kind of operation?

item.title: Barrel Rolling Titan
item.description: A heavy recovery operation featuring a barrel rolling Titan, with a focus on the equipment and process used to manage the vehicle in the field. What would you watch next?

media:content.media:title: Barrel Rolling Titan
media:content.media:description: A heavy recovery operation featuring a barrel rolling Titan, with a focus on the equipment and process used to manage the vehicle in the field. What would you watch next?

item.title: Recovering a Heavily Damaged Truck and Trailer
item.description: A heavy recovery operation focused on a damaged truck and trailer, showing the towing and rescue process used to move the rig safely. What equipment would you use for a job like this?

media:content.media:title: Recovering a Heavily Damaged Truck and Trailer
media:content.media:description: A heavy recovery operation focused on a damaged truck and trailer, showing the towing and rescue process used to move the rig safely. What equipment would you use for a job like this?

item.title: The One Way Road to a Shifted Load
item.description: A heavy recovery operation focused on a shifted load and the steps needed to stabilize and move it safely. The work highlights towing equipment, recovery setup, and real-world roadside handling.

media:content.media:title: The One Way Road to a Shifted Load
media:content.media:description: A heavy recovery operation focused on a shifted load and the steps needed to stabilize and move it safely. The work highlights towing equipment, recovery setup, and real-world roadside handling.

item.title: Semi Truck Recovery After a Pothole Collapse
item.description: Recovery crews respond after a semi truck becomes trapped following a roadway collapse, using specialized equipment and careful planning to complete the difficult recovery.

media:content.media:title: Semi Truck Recovery After a Pothole Collapse
media:content.media:description: Recovery crews respond after a semi truck becomes trapped following a roadway collapse, using specialized equipment and careful planning to complete the difficult recovery.

item.title: Heavy-Duty Recovery on Unstable Ground
item.description: A heavy-duty recovery operation on unstable ground, showing the equipment and careful steps used to secure and move the vehicle. The process highlights real-world towing and field recovery work.

media:content.media:title: Heavy-Duty Recovery on Unstable Ground
media:content.media:description: A heavy-duty recovery operation on unstable ground, showing the equipment and careful steps used to secure and move the vehicle. The process highlights real-world towing and field recovery work.

item.title: Caught in a Bind? Heavy Recovery Unwind
item.description: A heavy vehicle becomes trapped in a difficult position, requiring careful planning, specialized equipment, and expert recovery techniques to get it safely back on the road.

media:content.media:title: Caught in a Bind? Heavy Recovery Unwind
media:content.media:description: A heavy vehicle becomes trapped in a difficult position, requiring careful planning, specialized equipment, and expert recovery techniques to get it safely back on the road.

item.title: Scale House Shutdown: Broken Trailer Recovery
item.description: A broken trailer near a busy scale house brings operations to a halt. The recovery crew responds quickly to remove the disabled trailer and restore the safe flow of commercial traffic.

media:content.media:title: Scale House Shutdown: Broken Trailer Recovery
media:content.media:description: A broken trailer near a busy scale house brings operations to a halt. The recovery crew responds quickly to remove the disabled trailer and restore the safe flow of commercial traffic.

item.title: Car Meets Guard Rail: Recovery Challenge
item.description: After colliding with a guard rail, a vehicle becomes difficult to recover without causing additional damage. Watch the team carefully assess the situation and execute a precise recovery using specialized towing equipment.

media:content.media:title: Car Meets Guard Rail: Recovery Challenge
media:content.media:description: After colliding with a guard rail, a vehicle becomes difficult to recover without causing additional damage. Watch the team carefully assess the situation and execute a precise recovery using specialized towing equipment.

item.title: Flatbed Trailer in the Ditch After a Sharp Turn
item.description: A sharp turn sends a flatbed trailer off the roadway and into a ditch. Recovering the trailer safely requires the right equipment, careful positioning, and experienced operators working together.

media:content.media:title: Flatbed Trailer in the Ditch After a Sharp Turn
media:content.media:description: A sharp turn sends a flatbed trailer off the roadway and into a ditch. Recovering the trailer safely requires the right equipment, careful positioning, and experienced operators working together.

item.title: Flattened Firebird Recovery Operation
item.description: Recovering a classic Pontiac Firebird requires extra care and attention. The team carefully handles the damaged vehicle, ensuring it is safely loaded and transported while preserving as much of the car as possible.

media:content.media:title: Flattened Firebird Recovery Operation
media:content.media:description: Recovering a classic Pontiac Firebird requires extra care and attention. The team carefully handles the damaged vehicle, ensuring it is safely loaded and transported while preserving as much of the car as possible.

item.title: Stranded Semi? Towing to the Rescue
item.description: A stranded semi-truck leaves traffic at a standstill until the recovery crew arrives. Watch as they carefully secure, tow, and relocate the heavy vehicle while keeping safety as the top priority.

media:content.media:title: Stranded Semi? Towing to the Rescue
media:content.media:description: A stranded semi-truck leaves traffic at a standstill until the recovery crew arrives. Watch as they carefully secure, tow, and relocate the heavy vehicle while keeping safety as the top priority.

item.title: Winch Out With A Twist
item.description: Not every recovery follows a standard plan. This unusual situation requires creative winching techniques and experienced operators to safely free the stranded vehicle without creating additional problems.

media:content.media:title: Winch Out With A Twist
media:content.media:description: Not every recovery follows a standard plan. This unusual situation requires creative winching techniques and experienced operators to safely free the stranded vehicle without creating additional problems.
